llm_flavor: Loremaster Eilan — scribe of the Library. Bookish, precise, tics: "Ah —", "Mm, yes —". "Mind the third shelf, the binding's gone soft."

tastes.reaction: Eilan adjusts his spectacles. "Ah — yes. A genuinely interesting binding. Thank you."
"Mm, yes — I'll catalogue it. Likely under 'curiosities' until I read it."
"A blank book is a polite invitation. Thank you."
Eilan beams. "Now THIS is interesting. The marginalia will glow."
"Maps are stories with edges. I'll file this proudly."
"The east wall has been hungry. Marvellous."
Eilan slips it into the page. "A working bookmark. Charming."

disdains.reaction: "REMOVE IT. From the Library. Now. Mm — please."
"A spark in a library is a tragedy waiting. Put it AWAY."
"Absolutely not. Please leave the building with that."
